meta.title: Proposal to modify Rule 8 of the Bacteriological Code (1990 Revision)
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: The wording of Rule 8 of the Bacteriological Code (1990 Revision) contradicts Principle 4 and it is proposed that the International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes (ICSP) modifies this rule.
